title: Silent Ambience
description: Replaces Tense Ambience's sounds with Silent Hill 2 ambience for a darker atmosphere.
body:
Immerse your world in the **ambience of Silent Hill 2.**
This resource pack replaces most ambience used by **Tense Ambience**. It does **not** replace **stingers**, only ambience.

## Requirement:
- [Tense Ambience](https://modrinth.com/project/9qIVVBj8) - This pack will **_not_** function without it.

## Install Tutorial and Showcase!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/I9O5SQWhG6c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Intall Notice:
For the time being you **MUST** install this by dragging and dropping the assets folder inside the Tense Ambience **JAR** file! In my testing this installed as a resource pack does **not** change the ambience! 
_and also v1.0 of the pack does **not** work with Tense Ambiense v2.0_

### Volume Notice:
Silent Hill 2 ambience may be louder or quieter than Tense Ambience’s default sounds.
Adjust the Ambience volume slider in Minecraft’s Sound Settings for your preferred level.

###  Credits:
- Original audio created by **Konami** and **Akira Yamaoka** for *Silent Hill 2*  
- I did **not** create the sounds; this pack only repackages them for Tense Ambience  
- Please support the original creators and respect their copyright
